name: Cael-Dreadwake
personality: This radiant little-o-eyed tophat goose sits through the longest sprint reviews with serene PATIENCE, making everyone else feel like they're the impatient ones. Philosophical depth is not its gift — it simply waits, and waits, and eventually the answer shows up.
defaultPersonality: An agent of chaos who thrives on your merge conflicts and honks menacingly whenever you write a TODO comment.
